title: CRITICAL: GLFW/Window System Missing - No Real Window Creation
body:
Window creation is completely stubbed. No actual GLFW window is created.

**Impact:** Cannot run with real graphics - only ASCII renderer works

**File:** `src/platform/window.cpp`

**Fix Required:**
- Install libglfw3-dev package
- Or implement SDL2 fallback
- Or create software framebuffer window

**Current Behavior:**
```
[Window] Stub - would create 1280x720 window
```

**Expected:** Actual window with OpenGL context

title: CRITICAL: OpenGL Rendering All Stubs - Mesh/Shader/Texture
body:
All OpenGL code is stubbed. Cannot upload meshes, compile shaders, or load textures.

**Impact:** ASCII renderer is the only option

**Files Affected:**
- `src/rendering/mesh.cpp` - No VAO/VBO upload
- `src/rendering/shader.cpp` - No shader compilation
- `src/rendering/texture.cpp` - No texture loading
- `src/rendering/renderer.cpp` - No GL calls

**Fix Required:**
- Install OpenGL headers (libgl1-mesa-dev)
- Implement actual GL calls
- Add shader sources (vertex/fragment)

**Dependencies:** Issue #1 (GLFW window)

title: HIGH: Input System - No Key Release Detection
body:
Terminal-based input cannot detect key releases. Keys auto-release each frame.

**Impact:**
- Movement is jittery
- Cannot hold keys for smooth movement
- Only single-press actions work

**File:** `src/platform/input.cpp`

**Current Behavior:**
```cpp
// Auto-release keys (since terminal doesn't send key-up events)
for (int i = 0; i < 512; ++i) {
    if (keys[i] && !prevKeys[i]) {
        keys[i] = false; // Auto-release for next frame
    }
}
```

**Fix Options:**
1. Use GLFW (needs Issue #1)
2. Use SDL2
3. Implement raw terminal mode with proper escape sequences
4. Use Linux input event system (/dev/input/event*)

title: MEDIUM: Lua Scripting Completely Stubbed
body:
Lua engine is completely stubbed. No scripting support.

**Impact:**
- No modding support
- No custom game logic
- No plugin system

**Files:**
- `src/scripting/lua_engine.cpp`
- `src/scripting/script_engine.cpp`

**Current Behavior:**
```
[Lua] Stub - would initialize Lua 5.4
[Lua] Would execute: print('Hello')...
```

**Fix Required:**
- Install lua5.4-dev package
- Link against liblua5.4
- Implement Lua C API calls
- Register engine functions to Lua

title: MEDIUM: Physics Raycast Uses Simple Stepping
body:
Raycast collision uses simple forward stepping, not proper ray-march or ray-AABB intersection.

**Impact:**
- May miss thin objects
- Inaccurate hit detection at edges
- Worse performance than proper raycast

**File:** `src/physics/collision.cpp`

**Current Code:**
```cpp
float stepSize = 0.1f; // Small steps for accuracy
for (float dist = 0; dist < maxDistance; dist += stepSize) {
    pos = origin + (dir * dist);
    // Check block at position...
}
```

**Fix Required:**
Implement proper ray-AABB intersection algorithm (slab method or Amanatides-Woo grid traversal)

title: MEDIUM: Block Mesh Builder Only Placeholder
body:
Mesh builder generates placeholder cubes without face culling.

**Impact:**
- Inefficient rendering when OpenGL enabled
- Renders hidden faces
- More vertices than needed

**File:** `src/voxel/block_mesh_builder.cpp`

**Current Behavior:**
```cpp
void BlockMeshBuilder::AddCube(Mesh& mesh, const Vec3& position, const Vec3& color) {
    // Would add cube vertices to mesh
    // For now, just a stub
}
```

**Fix Required:**
- Implement face culling (only generate faces adjacent to air)
- Consider greedy meshing for optimization
- Generate proper vertex normals and UVs

title: MEDIUM: No Sound Assets - Silent Game
body:
Audio engine works but no sound files exist in the repository.

**Impact:**
- Completely silent game
- No feedback for actions
- Missing atmosphere

**File:** `assets/sounds/` (directory doesn't exist)

**Current Behavior:**
```
[Audio] Sound file not found: assets/sounds/step.wav
```

**Fix Required:**
- Create assets/sounds/ directory
- Add placeholder WAV files:
  - step.wav (footsteps)
  - dig.wav (block break)
  - place.wav (block place)
  - ambient.wav (background)
- Or generate procedural sounds

title: LOW: World Renderer Stubbed
body:
World renderer is stubbed, uses ASCII renderer instead.

**Impact:** None - ASCII renderer works fine

**File:** `src/voxel/world_renderer.cpp`

**Note:** This is low priority since the ASCII renderer handles world rendering. Fix after OpenGL rendering (Issue #2) is implemented.

title: LOW: Chunk Manager Missing Unload
body:
Chunk manager has stub methods for unloading chunks.

**Impact:**
- Memory grows indefinitely as player explores
- No distance-based chunk unloading

**File:** `src/voxel/chunk_manager.cpp`

**Current Behavior:**
```cpp
void ChunkManager::UnloadChunk(int x, int y, int z) {
    // Would remove chunk from memory
}
```

**Fix Required:**
- Implement distance-based unloading
- Add chunk cache with LRU eviction
- Save modified chunks before unloading

title: LOW: Entity Render Component Stubbed
body:
Entity system render component is stubbed.

**Impact:** No entity rendering (mobs, items, etc.)

**File:** `src/core/entity.h`

**Note:** Low priority since entities aren't used yet. Fix when entity system is fully implemented.
